Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants to identify anomalies in the provided event log data hypothesize reasons for them and propose SQL queries to investigate further

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Normal Flow 1 Register Order 2 Perform Credit Check 3 Validate Stock 4 Confirm Shipment 5 Ship Goods 6 Issue Invoice 7 Receive Payment

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1002 1 Register Order 2 Confirm Shipment early 3 Ship Goods 4 Perform Credit Check late 5 Validate Stock late 6 Issue Invoice 7 Receive Payment Anomaly Order of activities is out of sequence Credit check and stock validation happen after shipment

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1003 1 Register Order 2 Perform Credit Check 3 Ship Goods Confirm Shipment is missing before it 4 Issue Invoice 5 Confirm Shipment late 6 Receive Payment Anomaly Ship Goods happens before Confirm Shipment

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Case 1004 1 Register Order 2 Receive Payment early 3 Issue Invoice late 4 Confirm Shipment 5 Ship Goods Anomaly Payment received before invoice is issued Also no Credit Check no Validate Stock

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: I need to structure the response as 1 Identified Anomalies and Undesirable Behaviors 2 Hypotheses for Occurrence 3 SQL Queries for Investigation

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Case 1002 Out of order execution Confirm Shipment Ship Goods before Credit Check and Validate Stock Hypothesis Rush order priority order bypassed standard checks or system glitch allowed skipping steps Additional info shows attempted early Y

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1003 Out of order execution Ship Goods before Confirm Shipment Hypothesis System synchronization issue between warehouse and logistics or a manual override

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Case 1004 Payment received before invoice issued missing Credit Check and Validate Stock Hypothesis System bug in order status updates or prepaid order not properly routed through standard fulfillment checks

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For the SQL queries I will write PostgreSQL queries

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Query 1 Find all cases where Ship Goods happens before Perform Credit Check or Validate Stock

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Query 2 Find all cases where Receive Payment happens before Issue Invoice

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Query 3 Find cases with missing mandatory activities eg missing Validate Stock or Perform Credit Check

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Query 4 Check if priority orders are more likely to have out of sequence activities by joining with the orders table

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Query 5 Analyze resources involved in anomalous events by joining with the resources table
